message:
Collapse duplicate projects, auto-hide warmup sessions, reduce visual noise

- Group projects by name instead of dir_id so the same project across
  hosts/worktrees appears as a single sidebar entry
- Auto-hide task agent work dirs, toil runs, and bare tmp on import
- Show thinking blocks expanded by default
- Dim tool result blocks instead of bordered highlight

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 export function ThinkingBlock({ content }: { content: string }) {
   return (
-    <details className="group">
+    <details open className="group">
       <summary className="text-xs text-slate cursor-pointer hover:text-ink select-none">
         Thinking...
       </summary>
